retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional and always succeed; a retry would cause a double-release.
contract_summary: This function releases the reference count of a bfq_queue via two put operations: bfq_put_cooperator (decrement cooperator reference) and bfq_release_process_ref (decrement process reference). It also handles the case where the queue is currently in service by forcing expiration and scheduling dispatch. After calling this function, the bfq_queue pointer is invalid and must not be used. No return value; the caller does not need to check success.
